name: Cleanlab
description: Data-centric AI platform that automatically finds and fixes label errors and data issues in tabular, text, and vision datasets.

seo.title: Cleanlab — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Cleanlab: Data-centric AI platform that automatically finds and fixes label errors and data issues in tabular, text, and vision datasets.

when_to_use: Finding label errors in training datasets before fine-tuning
Estimating data quality scores for ML dataset audits
Cleaning noisy text classification datasets with Datalab
Improving model accuracy by fixing mislabeled training examples

pros: Finds label errors across text, vision, tabular
cons: Requires labeled dataset to start with
review.verdict: The go-to when dataset quality — not model choice — is limiting your metrics.
review.best_for: ML teams debugging accuracy ceilings caused by label noise
review.not_for: Teams with already-clean data or no labeled ground truth yet
